'''âl-s-l''' ('''lasala''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:volcanize|volcanize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-s-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:volcanize|volcanize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-s-l
|-
! Lemma
| lasala
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lasalithi|lasalithi]] || [[word:lasaliji|lasaliji]] || [[word:lasalishi|lasalishi]] || [[word:lasali|lasali]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lasaluthuth|lasaluthuth]] || [[word:lasalujuj|lasalujuj]] || [[word:lasalushush|lasalushush]] || [[word:lasal|lasal]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lasaluthu|lasaluthu]] || [[word:lasaluju|lasaluju]] || [[word:lasalushu|lasalushu]] || [[word:lasalu|lasalu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lasalufuth|lasalufuth]] || [[word:lasalufuj|lasalufuj]] || [[word:lasalufush|lasalufush]] || [[word:lasaluf|lasaluf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lasalethe|lasalethe]] || [[word:lasaleje|lasaleje]] || [[word:lasaleshe|lasaleshe]] || [[word:lasale|lasale]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lasalothoth|lasalothoth]] || [[word:lasalojoj|lasalojoj]] || [[word:lasaloshosh|lasaloshosh]] || [[word:lasal|lasal]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lasalotho|lasalotho]] || [[word:lasalojo|lasalojo]] || [[word:lasalosho|lasalosho]] || [[word:lasalo|lasalo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lasalofoth|lasalofoth]] || [[word:lasalofoj|lasalofoj]] || [[word:lasalofosh|lasalofosh]] || [[word:lasalof|lasalof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lasalĂŻfĂŻf|lasalĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻfĂŻf|lasalĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻfĂŻf|lasalĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻfĂŻf|lasalĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]] || [[word:lasalĂŻf|lasalĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lasalĂŠthĂŠ|lasalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:lasalĂŠjĂŠ|lasalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:lasalĂŠshĂŠ|lasalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:lasalĂŠ|lasalĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lasalathath|lasalathath]] || [[word:lasalajaj|lasalajaj]] || [[word:lasalashash|lasalashash]] || [[word:lasal|lasal]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lasalatha|lasalatha]] || [[word:lasalaja|lasalaja]] || [[word:lasalasha|lasalasha]] || [[word:lasala|lasala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lasalafath|lasalafath]] || [[word:lasalafaj|lasalafaj]] || [[word:lasalafash|lasalafash]] || [[word:lasalaf|lasalaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:lasalasha|lasalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:golasalasha|golasalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokilasalasha|gokilasalasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:lasalnĂŒsha|lasalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:golasalnknĂŒsha|golasalnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokilasalnĂŒsha|gokilasalnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:lasalshĂ«sha|lasalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golasalnkshĂ«sha|golasalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokilasalshĂ«sha|gokilasalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lasalrosha|lasalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:golasalnkrosha|golasalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilasalrosha|gokilasalrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lasalmusha|lasalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:golasalnkmusha|golasalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilasalmusha|gokilasalmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:lasalsherasha|lasalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:golasalnksherasha|golasalnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokilasalsherasha|gokilasalsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:lasalngasha|lasalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:golasalnkngasha|golasalnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokilasalngasha|gokilasalngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lasalyasha|lasalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:golasalnkyasha|golasalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokilasalyasha|gokilasalyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:lasalyamasha|lasalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:golasalnkyamasha|golasalnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokilasalyamasha|gokilasalyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:lasalnĂŒshĂ«sha|lasalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:golasalnknĂŒshĂ«sha|golasalnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilasalnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokilasalnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lasalnĂŒrosha|lasalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golasalnknĂŒrosha|golasalnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilasalnĂŒrosha|gokilasalnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lasalnĂŒmusha|lasalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golasalnknĂŒmusha|golasalnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilasalnĂŒmusha|gokilasalnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:lasalshĂ«nĂŒsha|lasalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:golasalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|golasalnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilasalshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokilasalshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lasalshĂ«rosha|lasalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golasalnkshĂ«rosha|golasalnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilasalshĂ«rosha|gokilasalshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lasalshĂ«musha|lasalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golasalnkshĂ«musha|golasalnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilasalshĂ«musha|gokilasalshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:lasalronĂŒsha|lasalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:golasalnkronĂŒsha|golasalnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilasalronĂŒsha|gokilasalronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:lasalroshĂ«sha|lasalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:golasalnkroshĂ«sha|golasalnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilasalroshĂ«sha|gokilasalroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:lasalromusha|lasalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golasalnkromusha|golasalnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokilasalromusha|gokilasalromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:lasalmunĂŒsha|lasalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:golasalnkmunĂŒsha|golasalnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokilasalmunĂŒsha|gokilasalmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:lasalmushĂ«sha|lasalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:golasalnkmushĂ«sha|golasalnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokilasalmushĂ«sha|gokilasalmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:lasalmurosha|lasalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golasalnkmurosha|golasalnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokilasalmurosha|gokilasalmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:lasal|lasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lĂŠsĂŠl|lĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:holasal|holasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:holĂŠsĂŠl|holĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholasal|hoholasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hoholĂŠsĂŠl|hoholĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒlasal|nĂŒlasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒlĂŠsĂŠl|nĂŒlĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlasal|nĂŒnĂŒlasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠsĂŠl|nĂŒnĂŒlĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻlasal|nĂŻlasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻlĂŠsĂŠl|nĂŻlĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlasal|nĂŻnĂŻlasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠsĂŠl|nĂŻnĂŻlĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lulasal|lulasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lulĂŠsĂŠl|lulĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululasal|lululasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lululĂŠsĂŠl|lululĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lilasal|lilasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lilĂŠsĂŠl|lilĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililasal|lililasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lililĂŠsĂŠl|lililĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kolasal|kolasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kolĂŠsĂŠl|kolĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolasal|kokolasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokolĂŠsĂŠl|kokolĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kelasal|kelasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kelĂŠsĂŠl|kelĂŠsĂŠl]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelasal|kekelasal]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekelĂŠsĂŠl|kekelĂŠsĂŠl]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
